pr.title: Record: Fused MLP (Triton+CUTLASS EVT) + Fast Causal N-Gram Tilt & Subword Certainty— 1.1052 BPB (3-seed mean)

output.summary: Fuses Triton TMA forward + CUTLASS EVT backward MLP kernels, widens MLP 3.5×, and uses Hessian-driven mixed int5/int6 quantization with Brotli packaging.
techniques: Fused Triton TMA forward and CUTLASS EVT backward MLP kernels
MLP expansion to 3.5× hidden dim guided by mechanistic SVD study
Hessian-sensitivity mixed int5/int6 quant with Brotli compression
